name: Cha Gio
recipeIngredient: 1 cup soaked, roughly chopped thread noodles
1/4 cup chopped red onion and chives
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak tree ear mushrooms, set aside.
2. Chop pork to a finer consistency and add it to a bowl with shrimp or crab, fish sauce, salt, pepper, garlic, onions, and chives.
3. Drain and dry the tree ear mushrooms and add them to the mixture.
4. Add thread noodles and blend thoroughly by kneading with hands.
5. Brush each side of rice paper with beer and set aside.
6. Cover with a cloth while working; let it soften for about a minute or two.
7. Place a heaping spoonful of filling on the bottom third of the rice paper.
8. Fold the sides over, then continue to roll until sealed with beaten egg and cornstarch.
9. Fry in oil heated to 350°F until golden brown.
10. Serve with lettuce leaves, garnishes, and dipping sauce.
Dipping Sauce:
1/4 cup minced garlic
1/2 cup fish sauce
1/3 cup lime juice
1 tablespoon sugar
1 teaspoon sa-te oil
